subject: You’re not the only one trying this
previewText: Get support, ideas, and a direct line to the SchoolAI team.
module-3-0-0: Become a SchoolAI Champion
module-4-0-0:
Hi {{ personalization_token('contact.firstname', 'fellow educator') }},

 

Find your people. Share what works. Get support as you lead.

 

Trying something new in education can feel exciting. It can also feel lonely when you are the first person on your campus to try it. That is exactly why we built SchoolAI Champions.

 

What Champions is

Champions is a community of educators who are exploring what AI-supported teaching can look like. It is not about being "the expert." It is about learning with peers, sharing what works, and getting support when real-world constraints show up.

 

What you will get

  • A circle of peers who are experimenting and sharing classroom-tested ideas
  • Opportunities to learn from other teachers, coaches, and innovators
  • Early access to what we are building, with a direct line back to the SchoolAI team

 

If you have been using SchoolAI regularly, you are already doing the work of a Champion. We would love to officially welcome you in.

 

- The SchoolAI team

 

P.S. You can join even if you’re not ready to host a Collaborative. Champions is designed to meet you where you are.
